title: clematis aristata var. blanda
intro: Clematis aristata var. blanda, also known as the Western Clematis or Western Virgin's Bower, is a perennial plant species native to the mountainous regions of North America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Clematis aristata var. blanda include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. Traditionally, the plant's roots and stems were used to prepare herbal teas and infusions, as well as tinctures and poultices for topical application.
